notes: 限流处置权交还给你:去掉自动退避与熔断。账号遇到限流(429)时,Tidewatch 会把服务端的原始响应保存下来,卡片上可展开查看、一键复制;该账号随即停止自动刷新(重启后也保持),手动刷新成功才恢复——不再有任何后台自动重试悄悄消耗惩罚期。
notes_en: Rate limiting is now fully in your hands: automatic backoff and circuit breaking are gone. When an account hits a 429, Tidewatch saves the server's raw response — expandable and copyable right on the card — and stops auto-refreshing that account (even across restarts) until a manual refresh succeeds. No more background retries quietly feeding the penalty window.
